args.pattern: executePromptSuggestion|export async function executePromptSuggestion|executeAutoDream|export async function executeAutoDream|executeExtractMemories|export async function executeExtractMemories

args.prompt:
Search the codebase for where UR automatically runs tests after finishing tasks, and where the agent/session decides to stop after completing work. Look for phrases like "test" in post-task flows, "smoke", "release:check", "typecheck", and any code related to auto-executing tests or continuing to think after task completion.

Return:
1. Exact file paths and line numbers for auto-test logic
2. Exact file paths and line numbers for session shutdown/termination logic after task completion
3. Any relevant function/class names
4. The current behavior: what triggers tests, what keeps the agent thinking after finishing

Don't write code, just research and report concisely.

args.subject: Make post-task testing optional via AskUserQuestion
args.description: Modify the verifier/project gates or system prompt so that after finishing a task, instead of auto-running tests, the agent asks the user (via AskUserQuestion) whether to run tests. Only run if user confirms.

args.subject: Stop agent promptly after task completion
args.description: Investigate why the agent keeps thinking after finishing. Adjust stop hooks, verifier, or prompt to ensure it stops cleanly once work is done, without extra idle thinking.

args.old_string:
import { isEnvTruthy } from '../../utils/envUtils.js'
import { detectProjectQualityStack } from '../projectQuality.js'
args.new_string:

import { getIsNonInteractiveSession } from '../../bootstrap/state.js'
import { detectProjectQualityStack } from '../projectQuality.js'

args.old_string: `Before reporting a task complete, verify it actually works: run the test, execute the script, check the output. Minimum complexity means no gold-plating, not skipping the finish line. If you can't verify (no test exists, can't run the code), say so explicitly rather than claiming success.`,
args.new_string:
`When you finish the substantive work of a task, do not automatically run the full project test suite. Instead, use AskUserQuestion to ask the user whether they want you to run the verification commands. Only run them if the user confirms. If they decline, report completion based on the verification you have already performed.`,
    `Before reporting a task complete, verify it actually works: run the test, execute the script, check the output. Minimum complexity means no gold-plating, not skipping the finish line. If you can't verify (no test exists, can't run the code), say so explicitly rather than claiming success.`,
    `When the task is fully complete and you have delivered your final response, stop. Do not continue with additional thinking turns, empty responses, or further tool calls unless the user asks for something new.`,

args.subject: Add verifier ask-before-gates setting
args.description: Add a settings.json config option (e.g., verifier.askBeforeGates) that controls whether project verification gates ask before running. Default false (auto-run). Update schema, supported settings, and verifier logic.

args.subject: Update documentation for verifier setting
args.description: Document the new verifier ask-before-gates setting in documentation/index.html or relevant docs.

args.old_string:
Verifier

UR_VERIFIER_MODE=strict
UR_VERIFIER_MODE=loose
UR_VERIFIER_MODE=off
UR_VERIFIER_AUTO_SUBAGENT=1

L1 gates catch false done claims and loops. /verify manually runs deeper verification.
args.new_string:
Verifier

UR_VERIFIER_MODE=strict
UR_VERIFIER_MODE=loose
UR_VERIFIER_MODE=off
UR_VERIFIER_AUTO_SUBAGENT=1

L1 gates catch false done claims and loops. /verify manually runs deeper verification.

Interactive users can set "verifier": { "askBeforeGates": true } in .ur/settings.json (or via ur config set verifier.askBeforeGates true) to have UR ask before running project test/typecheck/lint gates after a task, instead of running them automatically. Default is false (auto-run gates).

args.command: git diff -- src/services/verifier/index.ts src/constants/prompts.ts src/utils/settings/types.ts src/tools/ConfigTool/supportedSettings.ts documentation/index.html | head -200

    updateSettingsForSource('userSettings', {
      alwaysThinkingEnabled: iu?.alwaysThinkingEnabled,
      fastMode: iu?.fastMode,
      promptSuggestionEnabled: iu?.promptSuggestionEnabled,
      autoUpdatesChannel: iu?.autoUpdatesChannel,
      minimumVersion: iu?.minimumVersion,
      language: iu?.language,
args.new_string:
const iu = initialUserSettings;
    updateSettingsForSource('userSettings', {
      alwaysThinkingEnabled: iu?.alwaysThinkingEnabled,
      fastMode: iu?.fastMode,
      promptSuggestionEnabled: iu?.promptSuggestionEnabled,
      autoUpdatesChannel: iu?.autoUpdatesChannel,
      minimumVersion: iu?.minimumVersion,
      language: iu?.language,
      verifier: iu?.verifier,

args.command: git status --short && git log --oneline -5 && git diff --stat
git log --oneline -3 && git diff HEAD --stat | head -50
args.description: Check latest commit and current changes

args.command: git fetch origin master 2>&1 && git log --oneline --graph --left-right --decorate HEAD...origin/master | head -40

args.old_string:
# Changelog

## 1.43.6
args.new_string:
# Changelog

## 1.44.0

- Add `verifier.askBeforeGates` setting (default `false`). When enabled, UR asks
  via `AskUserQuestion` whether to run project verification commands after a
  task, instead of auto-running tests/typecheck/lint gates. Available in
  `/config`, `ur config set verifier.askBeforeGates true`, and
  `.ur/settings.json`.
- Prompt the model to stop after delivering its final response, reducing silent
  extra thinking turns.

## 1.43.6
